title: Gurugram University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Gurugram University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Gurugram University Result 2026 Out for Re-Evaluation Result of Exams held in May-June 2025 on the official website - gurugramuniversity.ac.in on 16-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Gurugram University result.

content.text: Gurugram University has officially released the Gurugram University Re-Evaluation Result 2026 for various UG and PG examinations conducted in the May-June 2025 session. The latest notification titled "Re-Evaluation Result of Exams held in May-June 2025 Notification No. 2506-13" has been uploaded in PDF format on the official website, listing the updated marks of students who had applied for re-evaluation. Gurugram University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - gurugramuniversity.ac.in. Students can download the re-evaluation result PDF directly from the result notices section and check whether their subject-wise marks have increased, decreased or remained unchanged after re-evaluation. After checking the updated result, candidates are advised to verify their roll number, course, semester and marks carefully and contact the examination branch or their college in case of any discrepancy.

Gurugram University has issued multiple re-evaluation result notifications in 2026, including the latest "Re-Evaluation Result of Exams held in May-June 2025 Notification No. 2506-13". These notifications cover a range of UG and PG programmes, allowing students who applied for re-evaluation to view the revised marks for their May-June 2025 exams. The results are published in downloadable PDF format on the official portal, making it easy for students to search their roll number and confirm their updated result status.

Gurugram University has activated the direct PDF link for students to check Gurugram University Re-Evaluation Result 2026 for exams held in May-June 2025. The re-evaluation result notification contains course-wise and roll number-wise details of candidates whose marks have been revised after re-checking of answer scripts. Students can use the official link below to download the notification PDF and quickly search their roll number to know their updated result status.

links.label: Re-Evaluation Result of Exams held in May-June 2025 - Notification No. 2506-13

sections.heading: Steps to Check Gurugram University Re-Evaluation Result 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download Gurugram University Re-Evaluation Result 2026 for May-June 2025 exams:

items: Visit the official Gurugram University website: https://gurugramuniversity.ac.in.
Go to the "All Notifications" or "Result Notices" section where result-related PDFs are listed.
Look for the link titled "Re-Evaluation Result of Exams held in May-June 2025 Notification No. 2506-13" under the latest result notices.
Click on the link to open and download the re-evaluation result PDF file.
Open the PDF and search for your roll number, course and semester using the search function (Ctrl+F) to check your updated marks.
Note any change (increase, decrease or no change) in your subject-wise marks compared to the original result.

If you find any discrepancy or need clarification regarding the updated result, contact the Gurugram University examination branch or your college authorities as per the contact details given on the official website.

structured_links.label: Re-Evaluation Result of Exams held in May-June 2025 - Notification No. 2506-13
